name: the-little-dungeon-that-could
description: A tiny Three.js dungeon-observer web app with simple rule-driven agents.

scripts.test:assets: npm run test:miniatures && npm run test:fungal && npm run test:spider && npm run test:waystation && npm run test:residential && npm run test:flooded && npm run test:laboratory && npm run test:royal && npm run test:old-lantern && npm run test:central-market && npm run test:orc-barracks && npm run test:industrial && npm run test:ossuary && npm run test:campaign-completion && npm run test:campaign-placement && npm run test:campaign-map && npm run test:world-interaction && npm run test:asset-integration
